name: User Registration
description: POST /auth/register — email/password registration returning JWT on success

name: User Login
description: POST /auth/login — credential verification returning JWT access token

name: JWT Token Management
description: JWT generation, signing, and validation middleware with configurable expiration

name: Password Hashing
description: BCrypt hashing for passwords with configurable work factor

name: Role-Based Access Control
description: Dependency-injected RBAC guards enforcing USER and ADMIN role permissions

name: Admin User Management
description: GET /users — paginated user list accessible to ADMIN role only

name: Swagger / OpenAPI Documentation
description: Auto-generated interactive API docs at /docs and /redoc with OAuth2 flow

name: Centralized Structured Logging
description: JSON structured logging middleware with correlation ID propagation and configurable log level

name: Correlation ID Middleware
description: UUID correlation ID assigned per request, propagated in logs and X-Correlation-ID response header

name: Centralized Exception Handling
description: Global exception handlers mapping custom exceptions to consistent JSON error responses without stack traces

name: Circuit Breaker
description: CLOSED/OPEN/HALF-OPEN circuit breaker wrapping external calls and unstable operations with configurable thresholds

name: Health Checks
description: GET /health/live and /health/ready endpoints for liveness and readiness probing

name: Environment-Based Configuration
description: All settings loaded from environment variables with startup validation and no hardcoded secrets

name: Unit Tests
description: Isolated unit tests for auth service, circuit breaker, exception handlers, and input validation (≥80% coverage)

name: Integration Tests
description: End-to-end API tests using FastAPI TestClient covering full register→login→protected-resource flows
